name: saude-plus
description: Monorepo do Saude+ com frontend React e backend Node

scripts.testar: npm run backend:test && npm run frontend:test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand
scripts.deploy:check: npm run backend:check && npm run backend:test && npm run frontend:test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand && npm run frontend:build && npm run lint && npm run vercel:function:check && npm run format:check
